name: Lantern & Blade: The Watch at Crow's Hollow
author: Lantern & Blade Project
description: A starter Game Pack for Lantern & Blade — a 5e-shaped d20 ruleset for heroic dungeon play, set in The Hollowmarch a century after the Wardens of the Watch were broken. Includes a six-room undead-haunted dungeon (The Watch at Crow's Hollow) and a level-3 pregen Fighter (Ren Callory) tuned to play it solo in 75–90 minutes.
